text:
Lenovo Thinkpad S440 + 13.0-CURRENT

rtsx0@pci0:5:0:0:	class=0xff0000 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x10ec device=0x5227 subvendor=0x17aa subdevice=0x501c card=0x504a17aa chip=0x522a10ec 
    vendor     = 'Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.'
    device     = 'RTS5227 PCI Express Card Reader'

rtsx0: <Realtek RTS5227 PCI MMC/SD Card Reader> mem 0xf0400000-0xf0400fff at device 0.0 on pci4
rtsx0: card_drive_sel = 0x41, sd30_drive_sel_3v3 = 0x03, reverse_socket is true
rtsx0: Card present
mmc0: <MMC/SD bus> on rtsx0
mmcsd0: 4GB <SDHC SD04G 8.0 SN 503D95E6 MFG 07/2008 by 3 SD> at mmc0 50.0MHz/4bit/256-block


Thanks everybody!
